config.mcp_server.title: MCP Server
config.mcp_server.allowed_tools_desc: Tools exposed via the MCP endpoint. Leave empty to expose all enabled tools.
config.mcp_server.no_tools_warning: No tools are currently enabled. Enable tools in the Tools section first.
config.mcp_server.auth_warning: Authentication is disabled. Anyone with network access can call your tools.
config.mcp_server.disabled_desc: Enable the toggle to expose AuraGo tools via the Model Context Protocol (MCP) for external agents.
config.mcp_server.info: Exposes AuraGo tools as a remote MCP server using Streamable HTTP transport. External AI agents can discover and call your tools over the network.
